title: Monster 4× RTX PRO 6000 — Threadripper AI Workstation
subtitle: 384GB VRAM · 4× 96GB GDDR7 · Threadripper 7960X · 256GB DDR5 ECC · the no-limits build — frontier models fully resident · prices a 2026-06-26 snapshot — edit / autofill to refresh

rows.name: GPU (each)
rows.spec: RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell 96GB GDDR7 ECC ×4 = 384GB VRAM. 1,792 GB/s, 24,064 CUDA cores, 600W. The reason this build catches fire.

rows.name: CPU
rows.spec: AMD Threadripper 7960X (Zen4, 24c/48t, sTR5). Quad-channel+ DDR5, 88 PCIe 5.0 lanes — real x16 to every GPU.

rows.name: RAM (kit)
rows.spec: 256GB DDR5-5600 ECC RDIMM kit (4×64GB) — feeds CPU-offload of big-MoE experts. ⚠ DDR5 server RDIMM is in a 2026 price crisis: a 256GB kit ranged ~$1.4k–$7k across listings. VERIFY a live kit before trusting this line.

rows.name: PSU
rows.spec: 4× RTX PRO 6000 @ 600W = 2.4kW GPU alone. Needs dual high-wattage PSUs (e.g. 2× 1600W) or a 2700W＋ unit on a 240V circuit. This is a wall-melter.

rows.name: Case + cooling
rows.spec: Full-tower / 4U workstation for 4× dual-slot blower PRO 6000s (600W each) + Threadripper AIO. High static-pressure airflow front-to-back.
